string.description: Text string value, can be unquoted, single-quoted, or double-quoted

number.description: Numeric value stored as a string, commonly used for ports and counts

boolean.description: Boolean-like value stored as string, typically true/false, 1/0, yes/no

path.description: File system path value used for directories, certificates, and log files

url.description: Connection URL combining protocol, host, port, and path for databases and APIs
